traits.name: Talons
traits.desc: You are proficient with your unarmed strikes, which deal {@damage 1d4} slashing damage on a hit.

traits.name: Language
traits.desc: You can speak, read, and write Auran.

traits.name: Age
traits.desc: Aasimar mature at the same rate as humans but live a few years longer.

traits.name: Size
traits.desc: Aasimar are built like well-proportioned humans. Your size is Medium.

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.desc: You can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Size
traits.desc: Dragonborn are taller and heavier than humans, standing well over 6 feet tall and averaging almost 250 pounds. Your size is Medium.

traits.name: Age
traits.desc: Dwarves mature at the same rate as humans, but they're considered young until they reach the age of 50. On average, they live about 350 years.

traits.name: Size
traits.desc: Dwarves stand between 4 and 5 feet tall and average about 150 pounds. Your size is Medium.
